Risk Title: Delay in access for Connexus PEDEV
Risk Desc:
Context:
Pearson is responsible for provisioning and approving access for Ascendion team members to required project resources and environments, including the Connexus PEDEV environment.

Condition:
Access approval for the Telerik team has been delayed by Pearson since December 2025, preventing the team from accessing the required environment and tools needed for development activities.

Consequence:

Development activities are delayed due to lack of required access.

Planned tasks could not be executed within the expected timeline.

Risk of missing commitments defined in the release plan. Project-Level           External                          Customer      Moderate    Unlikely    Medium
Category:
Tracking access requests through a centralized tracker to monitor status and avoid further delays.
Follow up regularly with the access provisioning team at Pearson plc to expedite approval for the Telerik team.
Risk Type: Re-prioritize the development backlog to focus on design
Likelihood: and planning activities while waiting for access.

Risk Desc:
Critical Issues Summary :-
1.)	The GEN AI Rules outcome is extracting all the conditions in the program which are not business rules (I.e. DB Calls / Error Handling / File handling and other Technical items)
2.)	GEN AI is not able to expand most of the cobol variables into business terms and is bringing them out as is in the program (We have asked for data dictionary to customer which they don’t have). We must build a data dictionary or look for alternate solutions.  
 Project-Level           External                          Customer         Major      Likely Very High
